query:
ALTER TABLE strategy_initiatives
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('not_started','in_progress','paused','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_started',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status_started_at BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status_completed_at BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status_reason TEXT;

ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS manager_function VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS manager_direct_reports_json TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS manager_onboarding_completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS manager_onboarding_completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL
